# load(_:)

**Instance Method**

Loads a [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCComposition] object into the view.

## Declaration

```swift
func load(_ composition: QCComposition!) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **composition**: The [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCComposition] object to load.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if successful; otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]. If unsuccessful, any composition that’s already loaded in the view remains loaded.

## Loading a Composition

- **loadComposition(fromFile:)**: Loads the composition file located at the specified path.
- **loadedComposition()**: Returns the composition loaded in the view.
- **unloadComposition()**: Unloads the composition from the view.
